feature: daily-view: remove day numbers from selector, cal → kcal

prompts.description: Remove day number span from day selector chips
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, inside the day selector map, remove the <span> that renders {idx + 1} below each day abbreviation.

prompts.description: Replace cal unit labels with kcal
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, replace all 'cal' unit labels with 'kcal': the 'of N cal' suffix, the per-meal >cal< label, and KPI tile labels 'calories planned', 'calories left today', 'calories above target'.
